title: Facebook (note title) — pandemic-era watchlist, futures, and life admin
html:
TL;DR

A wide-ranging late-March-2020 dump from 17-year-old Yahir in grants pass or at the start of covid pandemic era lockdown. Multiple parallel threads:

  1. value investing watchlist: carnival corp, Live Nation, Emerson Electric, beyond meat, Hertz, zoom — also recruitment stocks (BG Staffing, KForce, Staffing 360, Paychex), and a "will gold pop off?" question pointed at Curzio Research.
  2. post pandemic future thinking: China tracking apps, India infrastructure, Great Depression analogs, surveillance state from contact tracing, mass digital migration, science prioritization post-denial.
  3. Side hustles in parallel: marketing for business, FBA, stocks, eBay reselling, candy machine. fbla / FBA admin items mixed in.
  4. Real-life admin: prep dad's loan paperwork (personal financial statement, tax-return transcript, EIDL grant request), apply at Walmart / Albertsons / Fred Meyer / Wild River, return printer.
  5. A "Travis" outreach template ("just reaching out to see how everything is coming along during these uncertain times") — early networking muscle.
  6. A weird closing dream about Mrs. Ransom holding his car hostage and a razor scooter being collateral.

The "quibi ?" line is a perfect timestamp — the service launched the next month and folded inside a year.

Key quotes

"Leaning towards risking it for the biscuit and be safe with it with gold long term"

"MASS MOVE TO DIGITAL OVER BRICK AND MORTAR"

"PEOPLE WILL SWITCH FROM OLDER GENERATION THINKING OF AVOIDING AND DISBELIEVING SCIENCE AND FACTS TO LISTENING TO SCIENTISTS ABOUT FUTURE PANDEMICS."

"SURVIELLANCE OF POEPLE ORWELLIAN SFYLE, because of contact tracing"

Why it matters in the graph

This is the proof-of-concept that Yahir's "list five companies, then five futures, then five chores" mode goes back to age 17. The same multitasking shape recurs in 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream (now with crypto/web3 instead of Carnival Corp). Useful baseline node for any later disruption / post pandemic future thinking densify pass.

Open questions

  • Did the dad-loan EIDL paperwork actually go through? — possible later thread
  • "Carnival Corp" reappearance later? Did he ever pull the trigger on any of these positions?
  • "FBI SUMMER CAMPS / Did" — did he attend?

Wikilinks

carnival corp · beyond meat · zoom · quibi · fbla · covid pandemic era · post pandemic future thinking · value investing · surveillance state · grants pass or · Memory
